name: Sisters of Sigmar
source: Mordheim rulebook Part 2 - Warbands, fetched from https://www.broheim.net/downloads/rules/Mordheim%20-%20Part%202%20-%20Warbands.pdf on 2026-07-03. Cross-check against your own rulebook/errata (2005 Errata + Annual) before relying on it.

heroSlots.notes: 70 gc (dowry). Leader (6"). Prayers of Sigmar (see Magic). May carry two Sigmarite warhammers.
35 gc (dowry), 0-3. May carry two Sigmarite warhammers.

25 gc (dowry), 0-1. Never wears armour. Blessed Sight: re-roll any failed characteristic test and any to-hit roll (must accept the second result); if not taken out of action, roll two Exploration dice and pick one.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Sigmarite warhammer
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: Range: Close Combat; Strength: as user +1. Concussion: a 2-4 on the Injury table is treated as Stunned. Holy Weapon: +1 to wound vs Possessed or Undead (still need a natural 6 before modifiers for a critical). Only Matriarchs and Sister Superiors may carry two.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Steel whip
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: Range: Close Combat; Strength: as user. Cannot be parried (target may not parry with sword or buckler). Whipcrack: +1A when charging (added after other modifiers) and +1A when charged (usable only against the charger, strikes first); max +1A even if charged by several. Two whips: +1A for the extra hand weapon but only the first whip grants the whipcrack +1A.

specialRules: Sisters of Sigmar. The Sisters use their own Special skill list instead of one of the standard lists (skillLists id 'sistersOfSigmar'): Sign of Sigmar (Possessed/Undead lose their first attack in the first round of close combat, min 1); Protection of Sigmar (any spell affecting her is nullified on 4+, and then affects no one); Utter Determination (Matriarch only — re-roll failed Rout tests); Righteous Fury (hates all Skaven, Undead or Possessed warbands and every model in them); Absolute Faith (re-roll Fear tests; no test when fighting alone against several opponents). They never wear... they use only the weapons on their equipment list (blunt weapons, warhammer, whip, sling — no bladed weapons). Min warband size 3, max 15. | Human models use the standard human Maximum Profile (M4 WS6 BS6 S4 T4 W3 I6 A4 Ld9) from the core-rules Maximum Profile table — verify. Non-human models are left null; fill their racial maximums from that same table. | TODO: verify each Hero's skill-table access (Combat/Shooting/Academic/Strength/Speed) against the rulebook — the checkmark columns were ambiguous in the source PDF extraction.
